prompt:
A premium editorial-style ad layout set on a clean pure-white background. At the center sits a perfectly symmetrical solid rounded square (filled, not an outline) with a smooth vibrant gradient inside fading from Top-Left Color through to Bottom-Right Color.

A Description of Character is placed so that the lower edge of their torso lines up flush with the bottom edge of the square, no leftover colored strip beneath them. The figure and outfit stay in true-to-life colors and textures, lit by professional studio lighting that is fully separate from the background gradient, so no color tint bleeds onto skin or clothing.

They grip Product Description in a confident, realistic hold. Importantly, the crown of the head and hair push past the top edge of the square and overlap into the white space, while the hands and the product cross the side edges as well, creating a strong 3D breakout effect spilling onto the canvas.

Typography: Above the square, set on the white space with a deliberate gap, place the [Font Style] brand wordmark '[Brand Name]' in [Top Text Color]. Inside the square, layered over the gradient in the bottom-right corner, drop a small block of thin clean [Bottom Text Color] body text reading '[Slogan/Tagline]'.

Lighting is [Lighting Type: e.g., Sharp/Soft], crisp, and commercial, bringing out the texture of both the person and the product.
